DISCOVERY 302, MR. CARSWELL WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED IN OPEN COURT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF GLASS MOUNTAIN CAPITAL'S OBJECTION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR WAS NOT ABLE TO PRESENT EVIDENCE AT THE HEARING THAT THE MONEY HELD BY THE SHERIFF IS EARNINGS PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS BEFORE THE WRIT OF EXECUTION WAS LEVIED ON 6/9/11 AND THAT THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS SUBJECT TO AN EARNINGS WITHHOLDING ORDER FOR CHILD SUPPORT. ADDITIONALLY, JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS ORDERED TO PAY $100.00 PER MONTH UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED. =302/HEK

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - MICHAEL CARSWELL, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - MR. CARSWELL WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED IN OPEN COURT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Glass Mountain Capital's objection to claim of exemption. The exemption is Denied. The Judgment Debtor was not able to present evidence at the hearing that the money held by the Sheriff is earnings paid within 30 days before the writ of execution was levied on 6/9/11 and that the Judgment Debtor is subject to an earnings withholding order for child support. Additionally, Judgment Debtor is ordered to pay $100.00 per month until the judgment is satisfied. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HEK

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Opposition To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., for Judgment Creditor: Galss Mountain Capital Inc.
Michael Arswell, Judgment Debtor in Propria Persona

After hearing, Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is taken under submission. Judge: MONICA A. WILEY, not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-15-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
